provenance.name_source: TouchDesigner shipped OfflineHelp operator page names, joined on lowercase-alphanumeric normalisation
provenance.subset_of_reality: by construction -- the operator set is the live registry; no step can introduce a name TD does not have

semantics.name: TouchDesigner's own documentation page name (underscored display form). NOT guaranteed to match KB display names byte for byte -- join on normalised alphanumerics.
semantics.td_create: the OPType, i.e. families[FAM] class __name__ (e.g. 'abletonlinkCHOP'). This is NOT the builder '.n' create token, which for that operator is 'CHOP:ableton' and is recorded as build_token in KB/operators.json. Three namespaces exist; do not conflate them.
semantics.python_class: conventionally td_create + '_Class', with documented exceptions. The live class is authoritative.
